testcase.name: test_pool_refresh_admin_async_then_409
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter224_pool_status.py:128: in test_pool_refresh_admin_async_then_409 assert r1.status_code in (202, 409), f"unexpected first status {r1.status_code}: {r1.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: unexpected first status 200: {"status":"accepted","message":"Génération de 100 questions en cours…","batch_size":100} E assert 200 in (202, 409) E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
